summary: Completed comprehensive testing of PerformOS One-on-One Builder Phase 2 MVP. All core functionality working correctly including authentication, manager dashboard with metrics/tabs, team member view, and backend APIs. Premium UI styling verified with proper dark/white sections and gradient accents.

minor_bugs.issue: Unauthorized access protection test failed - endpoint may not be properly rejecting requests without authentication
minor_bugs.impact: Low - authentication is working for valid requests

passed_tests: Manager dashboard metrics display (5 upcoming, 6 completed, health score 61, 6 flags)
Manager Schedule tab with 6 team members
Manager Team Health tab with 6 active flags and severity badges
Manager Performance Trends tab with performance table
Team member dashboard with upcoming session and history
Database seeding verification (6 team members, 7 sessions, 6 flags)
Premium UI styling with dark navy background, white sections, blue-teal gradients
Role-based access control (manager sees all data, team member sees only own data)
Navigation between tabs and user roles
Flag categorization and severity display (wellbeing, workload, psychological safety)
